title: Glitter Glue Pens, 20 Pcs Glitter Pens for Arts and Crafts, Rainbow Glue Stick for DIY Bottle Decor, Projects Scrapbooking, Grad Caps, Cards Decorating Supplies
features: Package Includes: You will receive 20 glitter glue pens with 10 colours, each colour in 2 pieces. Ideal for school projects, arts and crafts, book covers, ornaments, bookmarks, notebooks, gifts, scrapbooks, and picture frames.

Rainbow Colors: Our art glitter glue pens have 10 colours, as the picture shows, sufficient quantity and colours ideal for creating all your craft projects.including red, yellow, green, blue, purple, gold, silver, rose red, pink, and orange.

Easy to Use and Safe Material: The glitter glue sticks are made of quality material. Our glitter glue is washable and safe to use on an array of surfaces while you create. Please close the lid so that it can be applied next time.

Stick to Various Surfaces: no more worrying about your glitter not sticking properly; Our glue glitter sticks can be applied to paper, fabric, craft sticks, foam and others; This allows your brilliance and creativity to stay intact and glitter for a long time; Cleaning is a breeze too; use warm water and soap or wet wipes.
Warm Notes: With these glue glitter pens on your craft works you need to wait for the glue to dry to exude an impressive dazzling colour; Please note that the drying time needs a longer period.
